children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall carry out this chapter through an Assistant Secretary of Commerce for Economic Development, to be appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.

children.heading: Compensation
children.label: b Compensation
children.text: The Assistant Secretary of Commerce for Economic Development shall be compensated at the rate payable for level IV of the Executive Schedule under .section 5315 of title 5

children.heading: Duties
children.label: c Duties
children.text: The Assistant Secretary of Commerce for Economic Development shall carry out such duties as the Secretary shall require and shall serve as the administrator of the Economic Development Administration of the Department.
